summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Wealth Command Super App new features. All 23 backend tests passed (100%). All 4 new frontend pages load correctly with proper data-testid attributes.

issues: Disclaimer modal appears on every page navigation - consider showing only once per session or adding 'Don't show again' option

critical_code_review_comments: All new route files follow consistent patterns with proper Pydantic models
All frontend pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
API responses include comprehensive data structures
Stock data is SIMULATED (not real-time ASX data)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo data and in-memory storage
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new super app features working correctly. Backend APIs: meeting-prep, research (screener, stock details, intrinsic values, dividends, alerts, sectors), compliance (dashboard, check, soa, audit-log), wealth (overview, performance, income, rebalance). Frontend pages: /meeting-prep, /stock-research, /compliance, /wealth-dashboard all load with proper data-testid attributes.

mocked_apis.AI_Features: REAL - Using Emergent LLM Key for AI Copilot

api_test_results.GET /api/research/intrinsic-values: PASS - Returns stocks sorted by margin of safety
api_test_results.GET /api/research/dividends/calendar: PASS - Returns dividend calendar with franking credits
api_test_results.GET /api/research/market-alerts: PASS - Returns market alerts and news
api_test_results.GET /api/research/sectors: PASS - Returns sector breakdown with performance
api_test_results.GET /api/compliance/dashboard: PASS - Returns compliance overview with metrics

frontend_test_results./meeting-prep: PASS - Page loads with Today's Meetings, client cards (John Smith, Michael Brown), data-testid='meeting-prep-page'
frontend_test_results./stock-research: PASS - Page loads with Market Alerts, Stock table (BHP, CBA, CSL, etc.), tabs for Screener/Intrinsic Values/Dividends/Sectors, data-testid='stock-research-page'
frontend_test_results./compliance: PASS - Page loads with Compliance Rate (93.3%), Risk Alerts, SOA metrics, AFSL badge, data-testid='compliance-center-page'
frontend_test_results./wealth-dashboard: PASS - Page loads with Net Worth ($2.2M), Asset Allocation grid, tabs for Shares/Property/Super/Crypto/Cash, data-testid='wealth-dashboard-page'
